Package com.uk.tsl.rfid.asciiprotocol.enumerations

Class SwitchAction

java.lang.Object
com.uk.tsl.rfid.asciiprotocol.enumerations.EnumerationBase
com.uk.tsl.rfid.asciiprotocol.enumerations.SwitchAction
public class SwitchAction extends EnumerationBase
Specifies the action to perform which a single or double press is active

    • ANTENNA_DEFAULT

      public static final SwitchAction ANTENNA_DEFAULT
      The instance of AntennaDefault Different antennas have different primary and secondary functions. Where an antenna supports RFID and barcode then the primary (single press) default may be RFID inventory and the secondary (double press) default may be barcode. If the antenna is a barcode only both actions may default to barcode. This value states that the switch should perform the default action for the antenna

    • FIND_TAG
